title: BetterPaths
description:
I made this mod specifically for myself in order to allow for more options for creating paths and decorating landscapes.
I may attempt to fix any bugs later.
But I decided that I would post this hoping someone found this useful.
body:
##  What Does it Add?
- Coarse Dirt Slab
- Dirt Path Slab
- Dirt Slab
- Farmland Slab
- Grass Slab
- Gravel Slab
- Podzol Slab
- Rooted Dirt Slab
- Sand Slab


- When an Entity travels on a Dirt Path Slab or a Dirt Path Block the Speed 1 Effect is applied. (ONLY FOR 1.20.1 THIS HAS BEEN REMOVED FOR ANY FUTURE VERSIONS)
